items.situation: asking for directions to a nearby coffee spot
items.speaker: Where's the nearest place to get coffee around here?

options.A: You're in luck, there's a cart right around the corner.
options.B: I usually prefer tea in the mornings.
options.C: The staff meeting starts at noon today.
options.D: It opens at seven every single day.

items.explanation: A 直接、自然地指出附近就有咖啡摊，回应了“在哪里”，最合适。B 借“coffee→tea”做语义联想陷阱；C 完全离题；D 答的是“几点”而非“在哪”。

items.situation: a student unsure about lab report requirements
items.speaker: I'm not totally sure what the lab report needs to include.

options.A: My printer is out of ink again.
options.B: Did you check the rubric the TA posted online?
options.C: The bus was really late again today.
options.D: Yes, the labs are held on Tuesdays.

items.explanation: B 用反问推进对话，指向能解决疑问的评分标准，最合适。A 借“report→printer”做语义联想；C 离题；D 答非所问（时间）。

items.situation: a classmate asking how to get the day's lecture notes
items.speaker: What's the best way to get today's lecture notes?

options.A: That song has a really catchy note.
options.B: I already had my lunch, thanks.
options.C: Actually, I can just share my scanned copy with you.
options.D: Yes, I take a lot of notes.

items.explanation: C 以“Actually”引出间接而有用的回应，直接解决了要笔记的需求。A 用“notes”的一词多义（音符）设陷阱；B 离题；D 用“notes（记笔记）”误读并未回答问题。

items.situation: expressing concern about a friend who seems stressed
items.speaker: Why does Marco seem so stressed out lately?

options.A: Stress can really affect your sleep.
options.B: The library closes at ten tonight.
options.D: Beats me, but I really hope he's okay.

items.explanation: D 用习语“Beats me”表示不清楚原因，并自然地表达关心，最贴切。A 借“stressed→stress”做语义联想却不回应；B 离题；C 答的是“从何时起”而非“为什么”。

items.situation: a student wondering how much reading is on the exam
items.speaker: I still don't know how much of the reading will be on the exam.

options.A: Have you tried asking the professor after class?
options.B: I failed my driving exam last year.
options.C: The cafeteria changed its whole menu again.
options.D: Yes, I studied hard all weekend.

items.explanation: A 用反问推进对话，建议直接问教授，最合适。B 借“exam→driving exam”做语义联想；C 离题；D 答非所问。

items.situation: a student asking a professor about office hours
items.speaker: Do you have any office hours this Thursday?

options.A: My office is on the third floor.
options.B: As a matter of fact, I'm free all afternoon.
options.C: The printer jammed again this morning.

items.explanation: B 用习语“As a matter of fact”自然确认周四有空，最合适。A 借“office→office 位置”做语义联想；C 离题；D 答的是“为什么”，与是非问不符。

items.situation: a student checking lost-and-found at the front desk
items.speaker: How do I report a jacket I left in the library?

options.B: The elevator is out of service.
options.C: Well, just fill out this form at the desk.

items.explanation: C 以“Well”引出间接指引，直接告诉了办理方式，最合适。A 借“jacket”做语义联想；B 离题；D 答的是“何时”，与“如何”不符。

items.situation: asking a store clerk about exchanging an item
items.speaker: Can I exchange this shirt for a larger size?

options.A: That shirt comes in three colors.
options.B: The store closes at nine tonight.
options.C: Because it was already on sale.
options.D: Of course, just keep your receipt handy.

items.explanation: D 用习语“Of course”爽快同意并给出提醒，最合适。A 借“shirt”做语义联想；B 离题；C 答的是“为什么”，与是非问不符。
